title: Platform Settings
page_subtitle: Manage your profile and personalize your experience

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.name: Display Name
profile.ad_notice: Your profile is managed by your organization's Active Directory. Contact your IT administrator to update your information.

appearance.title: Theme
appearance.description: Choose how RiskHub looks to you.
appearance.theme_light_desc: Clean and bright for daytime use
appearance.theme_dark_desc: True dark mode for OLED displays
appearance.persistence_note: Theme preference is saved locally on this device and will persist across sessions.

localization.title: Localization Settings
localization.language_description: Select your preferred language for the RiskHub interface.
localization.coming_soon_message: Full language translation is currently in development. Your preference will be saved and applied automatically once translations are available.
